name: Glazed Corned Beef
recipeIngredient: 5 lb Corned beef; cook according to packaged directions OR see my recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the corned beef according to the directions on the package. This can be done a few days ahead or in the morning of the day you want to serve.
2. Prepare the glaze by combining 8 oz orange marmalade, 1/4 cup brown sugar (add more or less to taste), and 2 tablespoons Dijon mustard (adjust to taste) in a small saucepan. Cook over low heat until melted and combined.
3. Spread the glaze evenly over the corned beef. Place in a preheated oven set to 375°F (190°C) and bake for about half an hour, or until heated through. Baste with any remaining glaze if desired.
4. Slice thinly and serve with caraway cabbage. Enjoy!
(Note: This has become one of our favorite second day holiday meals. It can also be served as an appetizer with small rounds of rye bread.)
